name: Overland Expo West 2026
description: The largest overland event in North America. Three days of education, gear, and trail runs in the Ponderosa pines outside Flagstaff. Vendors, speakers, demos, and community.
statusNote: Registration open. Book camping early — sells out fast.
parking: On-site camping and day parking available

name: Jeepers Jamboree — Rubicon Trail
description: One of the oldest and most iconic Jeep events in the world. The original Rubicon Trail run since 1953. A bucket list event for any serious 4x4 enthusiast.
statusNote: Registration opens early spring. Limited spots — sign up fast.
